# technical.pm

> A blog and portfolio by Milos Rujevic, Technical Product Manager. Covers DeFi product management, RWA (Real World Assets), on-chain private markets, Web3 PM career transitions, and enterprise AI.

## Author

Milos Rujevic — Technical Product Manager with 10+ years building financial systems (Red-Black Tree, SAP) and DeFi exchange infrastructure (Stellarity DEX). Documenting a 60-day transition into DeFi protocol product management targeting on-chain private markets roles.

Contact: milosrujevic@gmail.com
Site: https://technical.pm

## Blog Series: Tech PM → DeFi PM in 60 Days

A real-time documented journey from traditional tech PM into DeFi protocol product management. Covers RWA protocols (Centrifuge, Maple Finance, Ondo Finance), on-chain private markets mechanics, protocol limitations, and hands-on technical skill building.

- [Why I'm Betting 60 Days on DeFi](https://technical.pm/blog/post-0-why-defi) — Introduction to the transition: Stellarity DEX background, TradFi credentials, and the Orca Web3 PM role as north star.
- [What the Hell is RWA? (A Tech PM's First Week)](https://technical.pm/blog/post-1-what-is-rwa) — Real World Assets explained from zero: tokenized private credit, treasuries, and why $10T in private markets is broken.
- [5 Things That Are Still Broken in On-Chain Private Markets](https://technical.pm/blog/post-2-rwa-limitations) — Protocol limitations deep dive: oracle risk, legal enforceability gap, KYC friction, redemption illiquidity, counterparty concentration.
- [Reading the Blockchain as a PM (No Solidity Required)](https://technical.pm/blog/post-3-blockchain-for-pm) — ethers.js and viem from a product manager's perspective: reading contract state and talking credibly with engineers.
- [TradFi → DeFi: A Translation Guide](https://technical.pm/blog/post-4-tradfi-defi-translation) — Mapping TradFi concepts to on-chain equivalents: audit trails, policy engines, settlement, compliance.
- [I Built a Thing: RWA Private Markets Dashboard](https://technical.pm/blog/post-5-rwa-dashboard-launch) — Portfolio project launch: React + wagmi + viem dashboard showing positions across Centrifuge, Maple, and Ondo.
- [60 Days In: What I Got Wrong About DeFi](https://technical.pm/blog/post-6-retrospective) — Honest retrospective on the 60-day transition: surprises, corrected misconceptions, what actually mattered.

## All Posts

- [Azure AI Foundry: A Technical PM's Guide to Enterprise AI Development](https://technical.pm/blog/azure-ai-foundry-guide) — A comprehensive guide to Azure AI Foundry, exploring its capabilities, use cases, and integration points for enterprise AI development.
